title: Powered Tools
description: A WIP project that adds some simple battery powered tools to your world, with various battery capacities and materials (Alloys)
body:
Powered Tools is a mod that makes the idea of rechargable tools more realistic and close to home.
Features: such as including battery wear, which decreases capacity, this feature stops you making the tool and just recharging but makes you carry either more batteries or better batteries with larger cycles.

Devlogs can be found on hackclub [flavourtown](https://flavortown.hackclub.com/projects/1093)
Patches are on github modrinth have bigger updates [github](https://github.com/Acidicts/Powered-Tools-Minecraft-Mods/releases)
